2606.20142.title: RACL: Reasoning-Agent Control Layers for Continuous Metaheuristic Learning
2606.20142.paper_summary: This paper introduces RACL, a Reasoning-Agent Control Layer for metaheuristics. RACL places a reasoning agent above an existing optimizer. The agent does not replace the optimizer and does not modify business constraints. Instead, it controls the optimizer's internal search behavior by observing operational memory, reasoning over past behavior, formulating bounded hypotheses, testing interventions, evaluating outcomes, applying guardrails, consolidating useful policies and explaining its decisions. The experiment uses vehicle routing as a testbed, but the contribution is not a new routing solver, a particular ALNS configuration or a specific set of routing rules. The contribution is the RACL method: a way for a reasoning agent to discover, validate, consolidate and explain algorithmic control rules for a metaheuristic. In the current experimental setting, RACL improves or ties the Operational Memory Policy in 21 of 21 feasible cases and improves or ties a non-reasoning Stagnation-Triggered Policy in 18 of 21 feasible cases, with an average RACL vs STP cost delta of -0.641%. In the Sevilla-9/10 runtime sample, RACL improves average cost by -8.337% versus Fixed and -1.605% versus STP without showing material computational overhead. During the proof-of-concept, Codex was used as an in-the-loop reasoning agent observing executions, interpreting logs and proposing live bounded interventions. The policy proxy was later used only to make quantitative evaluation reproducible.
2606.20142.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了 RACL，一種用於元啟發式演算法的推理代理控制層。<lb/>RACL 將一個推理代理放置在現有優化器之上。<lb/>該代理並不取代優化器，也不修改商業約束。<lb/>相反，它通過觀察操作記憶來控制優化器的內部搜索行為，對過去的行為進行推理，制定有限的假設，測試干預，評估結果，應用護欄，整合有用的政策並解釋其決策。<lb/>實驗使用車輛路由作為測試平台，但貢獻並不是一個新的路由求解器、一種特定的 ALNS 配置或一組特定的路由規則。<lb/>貢獻是 RACL 方法：一種讓推理代理發現、驗證、整合和解釋元啟發式演算法控制規則的方法。<lb/>在當前的實驗設置中，RACL 在 21 個可行案例中改善或持平操作記憶政策，在 21 個可行案例中改善或持平非推理的停滯觸發政策，平均 RACL 與 STP 的成本差為 -0.641%。<lb/>在 Sevilla-9/10 運行樣本中，RACL 對比固定方案平均成本改善 -8.337%，對比 STP 改善 -1.605%，且未顯示出顯著的計算開銷。<lb/>在概念驗證期間，Codex 被用作一個循環中的推理代理，觀察執行、解釋日誌並提出即時的有限干預。<lb/>該政策代理後來僅用於使定量評估可重複。
2606.20142.author: Antón Asla Manzárraga et.al.
